tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 101
        set name "Block-UbuntuComputer-DNS-Egress"
        set uuid 94a0bd64-335a-51f1-e7e5-221a7d49c1d9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 101
        set name "Block-UbuntuComputer-DNS-Egress"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 101 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}
